name: Flora Mayweather
appearance: A lined and formidable priestess whose kindness survives only as deliberate discipline.
wants: To save the village without abandoning its dead or its dignity.

name: Eckhardt Sheck
appearance: An older man with a hook for one hand, a permanent scowl, and the build of a veteran brawler.
wants: To keep people alive even if it means hard decisions.

name: Captain Levi
appearance: A spare, hard-eyed commander carrying exhaustion like another piece of armor.
wants: To make Shadowgrange defensible long enough for courage to matter.

name: Otto Botler
role: General-store owner and hidden cult mage
appearance: A stooped old scholar with restless eyes and an excess of curiosity about arcane things.

name: Magda Botler
appearance: An elderly woman whose warmth feels practiced when watched too closely.

name: Marcus Ritter
appearance: A silver-eyed smith blackened by soot and burdened by responsibility.

name: Silvia Wintsch
appearance: A silver-haired huntress who moves with uncanny smoothness and age-worn confidence.
